title: Bitcoin miner Riot posts net income of $104.5 million in Q3, reversing previous quarters losses
text: Bitcoin miner Riot Platforms reversed previous quarter losses by posting a net income of $104.5 million in Q3 2025 earnings. The company demonstrated strong operational profitability as mining margins improved amid higher bitcoin prices. Revenue grew significantly with mining operations driving the results. The company's focus on cost management and hash rate efficiency contributed to the positive swing in profitability. Gross profit expanded substantially quarter-over-quarter as the company benefited from its low-cost power strategy. Riot's operational efficiency and strategic power management initiatives positioned the company as a competitive bitcoin mining operator. The reversal of losses marked an important milestone in the company's profitability journey, demonstrating the viability of its integrated mining and infrastructure approach.
